    completeDescriptionOperative Smith: “We have located a small plant far outside the main system… perhaps this will do? There’s absolutely nothing there.. except for bugs… it’s located at the coordinates x: 887, y: 220” Renegade Defector: “Yes, bring me there alive… and I’ll tell you everything I know.”
